source: C/S T.018 Rev 7, Section 2.2.3, Table 2.2, Appendix D
description: 23-bit LFSR PRN generator with G(x) = X^23 + X^18 + 1. Feedback = reg[0] XOR reg[18] into reg[22]; output taken from reg[0]. Period = 2^23 - 1 = 8388607 chips.
note: The first_64_chips_hex_clean strings encode 64 chip outputs, most-significant-bit-first within each hex nibble, leftmost nibble first.
